A/E LROM Cross-Section Explorer

Selected point-
Peak LROM-
FOM overlaynone
A/E sample space
The black rectangle marks the training box. The red point follows the sliders.

Precomputed FOM references

Clicking a reference button moves to that A/E point and overlays the exact FOM curve.
Differential cross section
Y axis is logarithmic. Moving the sliders shows an interpolated LROM curve from the precomputed A/E library.
Scaled KD potential terms
Interpolated l=1, ch=1 terms. Legend multipliers are visual scale factors.
